message:
Reuse tenzir-ship release workflow (#5765)

## Summary

Simplify release workflow maintenance by delegating complex release
orchestration logic to the [tenzir-ship](https://github.com/tenzir/ship)
external workflow. The release workflows now act as thin wrappers that
call `tenzir-ship/.github/workflows/reusable-release-advanced.yaml`,
reducing code duplication and improving maintainability.

**Key changes:**
- Consolidated 142 lines of custom release logic into 65 lines of
workflow definitions
- Moved version management, changelog creation, and SBOM generation to
tenzir-ship
- Added optional `title` input parameter for custom release titles
- Simplified SBOM job to depend on the delegated release job
- Both release and release-major workflows now use the same reusable
workflow

## Test plan

- Verify next release can be triggered via `release-major` workflow
dispatch
- Verify next minor/patch release can be triggered via `release`
workflow dispatch
- Confirm changelog entries are processed correctly
- Verify SBOM attachment completes successfully
- Validate that releases on non-main branches copy to main appropriately

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -12,11 +12,17 @@ on:
           user. Use full sentences and avoid abbreviations.
         required: true
         type: string
+      title:
+        description: |
+          User-facing release title (auto-generated if omitted)
+        required: false
+        type: string
 
 jobs:
   release:
     uses: ./.github/workflows/release.yaml
     with:
       bump: major
       intro: ${{ inputs.intro }}
+      title: ${{ inputs.title }}
     secrets: inherit

@@ -19,6 +19,11 @@ on:
           user. Use full sentences and avoid abbreviations.
         required: true
         type: string
+      title:
+        description: |
+          User-facing release title (auto-generated if omitted)
+        required: false
+        type: string
   workflow_call:
     inputs:
       bump:
@@ -29,169 +34,73 @@ on:
         description: Intro of the release
         required: true
         type: string
+      title:
+        description: User-facing release title (auto-generated if omitted)
+        required: false
+        default: ""
+        type: string
 
 jobs:
-  create:
-    name: Create
+  release:
+    name: Release
+    uses: tenzir/ship/.github/workflows/reusable-release-advanced.yaml@main
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
+    with:
+      bump: ${{ inputs.bump }}
+      intro: ${{ inputs.intro }}
+      title: ${{ inputs.title }}
+      pre-publish: |
+        VERSION_NUMBER="${RELEASE_VERSION#v}"
+
+        # Update tenzir-version in version.json using jq.
+        jq --arg version "${VERSION_NUMBER}" '.["tenzir-version"] = $version' version.json > version.json.tmp
+        mv version.json.tmp version.json
+
+        # Update package versions.
+        for package_dir in tenzir-common tenzir-operator tenzir; do
+          uv --directory "python/${package_dir}" version --frozen "${VERSION_NUMBER}"
+        done
+
+        # Keep dependency constraints in sync with the new version.
+        UPPER_BOUND=$(uvx --from semver pysemver bump minor "${VERSION_NUMBER}")
+        uv --directory python add --package tenzir --frozen "tenzir-common>=${VERSION_NUMBER},<${UPPER_BOUND}"
+        uv --directory python add --package tenzir-operator --frozen "tenzir-common>=${VERSION_NUMBER},<${UPPER_BOUND}"
+        uv --directory python lock
+
+        # Keep existing release behavior by staging tracked updates.
+        git add -u
+
+        echo "Updated version.json with tenzir-version: ${VERSION_NUMBER}"
+        echo "Updated Python package versions to: ${VERSION_NUMBER}"
+      publish-no-latest-on-non-main: true
+      copy-release-to-main-on-non-main: true
+      update-latest-branch-on-main: true
+    secrets: inherit
+
+  sbom:
+    name: Attach SBOM
+    needs: release
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     permissions:
       contents: write
-      pull-requests: write
 
     steps:
-      - name: Checkout repository
+      - name: Checkout release tag
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
-          fetch-depth: 0
-          persist-credentials: false
-
-      - name: Set up Python
-        uses: actions/setup-python@v4
-        with:
-          python-version: "3.x"
-
-      - name: Set up uv
-        uses: astral-sh/setup-uv@v5
+          ref: ${{ needs.release.outputs.version }}
 
       - name: Install Nix
         uses: cachix/install-nix-action@v30
         with:
           github_access_token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
 
-      - name: Generate an app token
-        id: generate_token
-        uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
-        with:
-          app-id: ${{ vars.TENZIR_AUTOBUMPER_APP_ID }}
-          private-key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_AUTOBUMPER_APP_PRIVATE_KEY }}
-          owner: ${{ github.repository_owner }}
-
-      - name: Set up GPG for signing
-        uses: crazy-max/ghaction-import-gpg@v6
-        with:
-          gpg_private_key: ${{ secrets.TENZIR_BOT_GPG_SIGNING_KEY }}
-          git_user_signingkey: true
-          git_commit_gpgsign: true
-          git_tag_gpgsign: true
-
-      - name: Configure Git
-        run: |
-          git config --global user.name "tenzir-bot"
-          git config --global user.email "engineering@tenzir.com"
-          # Embed token in remote URL for push authentication (checkout uses persist-credentials: false)
-          git remote set-url origin https://x-access-token:${{ steps.generate_token.outputs.token }}@github.com/${{ github.repository }}.git
-
-      - name: Determine release type based on branch
-        id: release_type
-        run: |
-          CURRENT_BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
-          if [[ "$CURRENT_BRANCH" == "main" ]]; then
-            echo "is_latest=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-            echo "Running on main branch - this will be a latest release"
-          else
-            echo "is_latest=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-            echo "Running on $CURRENT_BRANCH branch - this will be a non-latest release"
-          fi
-
-      - name: Check for unreleased entries
-        run: |
-          if [ ! -d "changelog/unreleased" ] || [ -z "$(ls -A changelog/unreleased 2>/dev/null)" ]; then
-            echo "Error: No unreleased changelog entries found in changelog/unreleased/"
-            echo "Add changelog entries before creating a release."
-            exit 1
-          fi
-          echo "Found $(ls changelog/unreleased | wc -l | tr -d ' ') unreleased entries"
-
-      - name: Create release
-        id: release
-        env:
-          RELEASE_INTRO: ${{ inputs.intro }}
-        run: |
-          VERSION=$(uvx tenzir-ship release create \
-            --${{ inputs.bump }} \
-            --intro "$RELEASE_INTRO" \
-            --yes)
-          echo "version=${VERSION}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-          echo "Created release ${VERSION}"
-
-      - name: Update version.json and Python package versions
-        run: |
-          # Extract version without 'v' prefix
-          VERSION_NUMBER=$(uvx tenzir-ship release version --bare)
-
-          # Update tenzir-version in version.json using jq
-          jq --arg version "${VERSION_NUMBER}" '.["tenzir-version"] = $version' version.json > version.json.tmp
-          mv version.json.tmp version.json
-
-          # Update package versions with uv
-          for package_dir in tenzir-common tenzir-operator tenzir; do
-            uv --directory "python/${package_dir}" version --frozen "${VERSION_NUMBER}"
-          done
-
-          # Keep dependency constraints in sync with the new version
-          UPPER_BOUND=$(uvx --from semver pysemver bump minor "${VERSION_NUMBER}")
-          uv --directory python add --package tenzir --frozen "tenzir-common>=${VERSION_NUMBER},<${UPPER_BOUND}"
-          uv --directory python add --package tenzir-operator --frozen "tenzir-common>=${VERSION_NUMBER},<${UPPER_BOUND}"
-          uv --directory python lock
-
-          echo "Updated version.json with tenzir-version: ${VERSION_NUMBER}"
-          echo "Updated Python package versions to: ${VERSION_NUMBER}"
-
       - name: Generate SBOM artifact
         run: nix run .#generate-sbom -- /tmp/tenzir.spdx.json
 
-      - name: Publish release
-        env:
-          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.generate_token.outputs.token }}
-        run: |
-          # Stage changes safely: -u for tracked files, explicit path for new release dir
-          git add -u
-          git add changelog/releases/
-          # The --commit flag commits staged changes, --tag creates and pushes
-          # a signed tag (via git config), and --no-latest prevents backports
-          # from becoming the "Latest" release on GitHub.
-          uvx tenzir-ship release publish \
-            --commit \
-            --tag \
-            ${{ steps.release_type.outputs.is_latest == 'false' && '--no-latest' || '' }} \
-            --yes
-
       - name: Attach SBOM to release
         env:
-          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.generate_token.outputs.token }}
-        run: gh release upload "${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}" /tmp/tenzir.spdx.json --clobber
-
-      - name: Copy release to main branch (non-latest release)
-        if: steps.release_type.outputs.is_latest == 'false'
-        env:
-          GH_TOKEN: ${{ steps.generate_token.outputs.token }}
-        run: |
-          cp -r "changelog/releases/${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}" "/tmp/release-dir"
-          git fetch origin main
-          git checkout main
-          cp -r "/tmp/release-dir" "changelog/releases/${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}"
-          git add "changelog/releases/${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}"
-          git commit -s -m "Add backport release Tenzir Node ${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}"
-          git push origin main
-
-      - name: Update latest branch
-        if: steps.release_type.outputs.is_latest == 'true'
-        run: |
-          git checkout -B latest
-          git push origin latest --force
-
-      - name: Output success message (latest release)
-        if: steps.release_type.outputs.is_latest == 'true'
-        run: |
-          echo "🎉 Release ${{ steps.release.outputs.version }} created successfully!"
-          echo "📁 Release directory: changelog/releases/${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}/"
-          echo "🏷️ Tag: ${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}"
-          echo "🌿 Latest branch updated"
-          echo "📋 GitHub release: https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/tag/${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}"
-
-      - name: Output success message (non-latest release)
-        if: steps.release_type.outputs.is_latest == 'false'
-        run: |
-          echo "🎉 Release ${{ steps.release.outputs.version }} created successfully!"
-          echo "📁 Release directory: changelog/releases/${{ steps.release.outputs.version }}/"
-          echo "📋 Release copied to main branch"
+          GH_TOKEN: ${{ needs.release.outputs.token }}
+          RELEASE_VERSION: ${{ needs.release.outputs.version }}
+        run: gh release upload "$RELEASE_VERSION" /tmp/tenzir.spdx.json --clobber
